sections.paragraph:
[Ephrathah], Gen 35:16, 19 Gen 35:19 Rth 4:11 (land, region).

(1) pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Judah, elsewhere called Bethlehem ( Gen 48:7); more fully Bethlehem Ephratah ( Mic 5:1).

(2) i.q. אֶפְרַיִם Psa 132:6 comp. אֶפְרָתִי No. 2.

(3) pr.n. f. 1Ch 2:19, 50 1Ch 2:50 4:4 .
